name: Baking Powder Biscuits (Diabetic)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix flour, baking powder, and salt together.
2. Cut in the shortening until it is evenly mixed with the dry ingredients.
3. Add milk, mixing well.
4. Knead for a half minute and roll out to about 1-1/2 inch in thickness.
5. Cut with a biscuit cutter.
6. Place the biscuits 1-1/2 inches apart on a greased baking sheet.
7. Brush with milk.
8. Bake at 450°F (230°C) for 10-12 minutes.
One biscuit may be exchanged for: 1 bread exchange or 1 fat exchange.
